title: WILDS Camelyon17 Hospital-Shift Histopathology Dataset

data_urls.access_notes: Use WILDS package and dataset documentation for official split metadata.
Use official download commands and evaluators.

instructions: Use the WILDS package to access Camelyon17 and its official hospital-domain split.
Prefer a stratified patch subset or frozen image embeddings for exploratory SPECTRA runs.
Record hospital, patient/slide metadata when available, label, split, and preprocessing.

scale.download_size: multi-GB image dataset; avoid full repeated pulls during agent exploration

recommended_axes.name: hospital_domain_similarity
recommended_axes.definition: Hospital/site support treated as an operating point and domain axis.

recommended_axes.name: stain_style_similarity
recommended_axes.definition: Train-fitted color, stain, texture, or image-embedding similarity.

recommended_axes.name: patient_slide_support
recommended_axes.definition: Patient or slide-level support to prevent patch-level leakage.

useful_for: Testing whether hospital split is one operating point on an image-style novelty curve.
Auditing patch-level leakage and site-specific artifacts.
leakage_risks: Patches from the same slide or patient must not cross splits.
Hospital identity can be confounded with label prevalence and staining style.
Patch-level metrics can overstate patient-level generalization.
